_meta.purpose: Mock-vs-real Gitea PR response shape parity reference, captured during Phase 1.9 / TD-002 part 2 live smoke test.
_meta.rigor_item: Item 2 of the max-rigor checklist (mock-vs-real shape parity).
consumer_code_paths: Promote-ToVerified.ps1: Invoke-DeclinedPrReconciliation reads pr.number, pr.title, pr.state, pr.merged, pr.head.ref, pr.head.sha, pr.base.ref, pr.user.login, pr.created_at, pr.updated_at, pr.closed_at, pr.merged_at, pr.merge_base
Promote-ToVerified.ps1: existing-PR check at Step 2 reads pr.number
Promote-ToVerified.ps1: post-PR-creation extracts pr.number, pr.html_url, pr.url
_meta.parity_status: All consumer-code-relevant fields are present in real Gitea responses. Mock subsets in Invoke-GiteaApi (pr_success / pr_fail / existing_open_pr modes) cover the consumer needs.

consumer_field_parity_check: PASS - every field in consumer_required_fields exists in the real response.
